page.title: Contributing to MotoX Wiki
page.summary: How to add or update motorcycle specifications.
page.content:
How to Contribute

MotoX Wiki is community-maintained. You can contribute by:

  1. Forking the repository on GitHub
  2. Editing the JSON files in data/ (motorcycles, pages, settings)
  3. Committing changes and opening a pull request

Data Guidelines

  • Always cite the source (service manual, OEM documentation)
  • Include year ranges when specs vary by model year
  • Use standard units (Nm for torque, L for volume) with conversions in parentheses
  • Mark unverified data in the notes field
